subcodes.title: Words to Habib Mu'ayyad, spoken on 1915-05-13
subcodes.first_line: I have wanted to share a secret with you but was unable to do so [earlier] at My home and, therefore, I disclose it now: These days, I am in the utmost danger. Perhaps I will be martyred.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من میخواستم یک سری بشما بگویم در خانه ممکن نشد لهذا اینجا میگویم و آن اینست که من اینروزها در خطر عظیم هستم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
